creator: gjohnson@nola.srrc.usda.gov
text:
This is a new port of g-wrap. G-wrap is a tool for specifying
types, functions, and constants to import into a Scheme interpreter, and
for generating code (in C) to interface these to the Guile and RScheme
interpreters in particular.

        This port is necessary for the update to gnucash, which I will
be submitting shortly following this submission.

Fix: Unpack the enclosed shar archive into /usr/ports/devel/g-wrap.
